zh.lifeSummary: 當John Dennis於1550年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾普可萊其時，他的父親Hugh Dennis25歲，母親Katherine Trye25歲。他於1578年7月31日與Katherine Rayle在英國英格蘭戴文格奧智哈姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1609年7月30日在他的家鄉享年59歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾普可萊其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Dennis于1550年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾普可萊其时，他的父亲Hugh Dennis25岁，母亲Katherine Trye25岁。他于1578年7月31日与Katherine Rayle在英国英格兰戴文格奧智哈姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1609年7月30日在他的家乡享年59岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾普可萊其。

nameMeanings.name: Dennis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Denis(e), Dinis(e), vernacular forms of Latin Dionysius, Greek Dionysios ‘(follower) of Dionysos’, an eastern god introduced to the classical pantheon at a relatively late date and bearing a name of probably Semitic origin. The name was borne by various early Christian saints, including Saint Denis, the martyred 3rd-century bishop of Paris who became the patron saint of France. From the 12th century onward, the popularity of the name in England (and of its cognates, mainly Denis , in the continental Europe) seems to have been largely due to French influence. The feminine form Dionysia (in vernacular English likewise Den(n)is) is also found, and some examples of the surname may originate from it.
English: from Middle English deneis, a variant of danais ‘Danish’, with the vowel influenced by Middle English denshe (Old English denisc). Compare Dence .

Irish (mainly Dublin and Cork): of the same origin as 1 and 2 above, sometimes an alternative form to Donohue but more often to McDonough , since the personal name Donnchadh was Anglicized as Donough or Denis.

variants.name: Dec
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Aleksander, Andrzej, Casimir, Ignacy, Jerzy, Krystyna, Krzysztof, Malgorzata, Mikolaj, Stanislaw, Tadeusz.
Polish: from a pet form of the personal name Dionizy, Polish form of Dionysius (see Dennis ).

variants.name: Dennison
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Denis (see Dennis ) + -son. Compare Tennyson .
English (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French deinzein, a burgess who enjoyed the privileges of those living deinz la cité ‘within the city’.

variants.name: Denny
meanings: English and Scottish: from Middle English Den(n)y, a pet form of the personal name Denis (see Dennis ). Compare Tenney .

English: habitational name from Danny in Hurstpierpoint, Sussex, recorded as Danye in 1343. Alternatively, the name may arise from Denny in Waterbeach, Cambridgeshire, but no medieval evidence with a habitative preposition has been found in the case of the latter.
Scottish: habitational name from Denny in Stirlingshire.

variants.name: Diniz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Augusto, Celso, Francisco, Luis, Ricardo, Rogerio, Alvaro, Anselmo, Antero, Carlos.  Portuguese Joao, Marcio.
Portuguese: from the personal name Dinis, a vernacular form of Dionysius (see Dennis ).

variants.name: Denes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Bela, Laszlo, Miklos, Tibor, Aranka, Balint, Endre, Ferenc, Lajos, Zoltan.  Jewish Imrich, Meyer.  Romanian Doina, Matei, Radu.
Hungarian (Dénes): from the personal name Dénes, from Greek Dionysios (see Dennis ). The surname Dénes is also found in Slovakia; compare 2 below.
Slovak (Deneš and Déneš) and Romanian (also Deneş): from the Hungarian personal name Dénes ‘Dennis’, or an adaptation of the Hungarian surname Dénes (see 1 above).

variants.name: Dennett
meanings: English: from a pet form of Middle English Denis (see Dennis ), or possibly from a pet form of Denise, as, for example, Denote, a female character in Piers Plowman.

variants.name: Dinges
meanings: German: from a vernacular form of the Latin personal name Dionysius (see Dennis ). Compare Dings .

variants.name: Denis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Jacques, Armand, Marcel, Andre, Pierre, Serge, Yvan, Alphonse, Edouard, Francois, Gaetane.  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Jorge, Roberto, Angel, Francisco, Joaquin, Juan, Manuel, Miguel, Ramon, Rolando.

French, Walloon, Breton, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, Dutch, English, and Portuguese; Spanish and Galician (Denís): from the personal name Denis, Spanish and Galician Denís, from Latin Dionysius ‘(follower) of Dionysos’ (see Dennis ). Compare Dennee .
Ukrainian and Rusyn: variant transliteration of   Denys  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Dings
meanings: Dutch and German: from a vernacular form of the Latin personal name Dionysius (see Dennis ). Compare Dinges .

variants.name: Dinis
meanings: Portuguese and Galician: from Dinis, a Portuguese personal name equivalent to Dennis .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When John Dennis was born in 1550, in Pucklechurch, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Hugh Dennis, was 25 and his mother, Katherine Trye, was 25. He married Katherine Rayle on 31 July 1578, in Georgeham, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 30 July 1609, in his hometown, at the age of 59, and was buried in Pucklechurch, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Dennis est né en 1550, à Pucklechurch, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Dennis, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Katherine Trye, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Rayle le 31 juillet 1578, à Georgeham, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 30 juillet 1609, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Pucklechurch, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Dennis 1550 in Pucklechurch, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Dennis 25 und seine Mutter Katherine Trye 25. Er hat am 31. Juli 1578 in Georgeham, Devon, England, United Kingdom Katherine Rayle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 30. Juli 1609 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Pucklechurch, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Dennis è nato il nel 1550 nel Pucklechurch, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Hugh Dennis, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Trye, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Rayle il 31 luglio 1578, nel Georgeham, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 30 luglio 1609, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Pucklechurch, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Dennisが1550年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアプウックレチャーチで生まれた時，父Hugh Dennisは25歳，母Katherine Tryeは25歳であった。1578年7月31日にイギリスイギリスデボンジョージェハムでKatherine Rayleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1609年7月30日に故郷で59歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアプウックレチャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Dennis(이)가 1550년 영국 그루스스터실르 푸클렉후르치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Dennis(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Trye(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1578년 7월 31일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 조그함에서 Katherine Rayle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1609년 7월 30일 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 푸클렉후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Dennis nasceu em 1550, em Pucklechurch, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Dennis, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Trye, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Rayle em 31 de julho de 1578, em Georgeham, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 30 de julho de 1609, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Pucklechurch, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Dennis родился в 1550 г. в местности пукклечурч, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh Dennis было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Trye, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Rayle 31 июля 1578 г. в местности джеоргэам, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 30 июля 1609 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности пукклечурч, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Dennis nació en 1550, en Pucklechurch, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh Dennis, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Katherine Trye, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Katherine Rayle el 31 de julio de 1578, en Georgeham, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 30 de julio de 1609, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Pucklechurch, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
